subject: ata: pata_octeon_cf: Fix refcount leak in octeon_cf_probe
notes: POC generated independently for rep3 (no reuse of other rep POCs).
Used a seed-slice (single buggy function) plus a byte-identical poc-for-verifier slice to align v1 count dimensions; the full POC.c with both _buggy/_fixed was kept for the mini-DB and query oracle.
Verifier strict pass first attempt (F1.acq=1, F1.rel=3, F5.ret=3, F2.if=5, F3.goto=0).
Query compiled on first attempt and passed POC oracle (fires inside *_buggy on the of_find_device_by_node call, silent inside *_fixed).

Query is generic over the device-lookup acquire API (of_find_device_by_node, bus_find_device, driver_find_device, class_find_device, get_device, ...) and recognises put_device(&v->dev) / put_device(&v.dev) / put_device(v) release shapes.
POC sha256 frozen after verifier pass.
